# Off-Map

> GTM consulting for services firms and early-stage founders. AI redrew GTM. We help you build for what's next.

Off-Map is a GTM consulting practice founded by Brendon Donahoo. We work with services firms and Seed to Series A founders who have hit a ceiling on founder-led selling. Most available GTM advice is borrowed from a world that no longer exists. We start from the business in front of us and build the motion that actually fits.

## Offers

### The Off-Map Audit — $350 (5 days)
A 60-minute working session (live, recorded, yours to keep). A 1 to 2 page written brief delivered in 72 hours naming one thing working, one thing broken, and one move to make next. A 15-minute follow-up two weeks later. The starting point for most engagements.
URL: https://www.off-map.com/services/audit

### Pipeline Sprint — $7,500 (6 weeks)
A full GTM rebuild covering ICP, messaging, channel strategy, and sales process. Delivered as a documented playbook you own. Founding-client pricing available at $3,750 for the first three engagements.
URL: https://www.off-map.com/services/sprint

### Fractional GTM — From $4,500/mo (ongoing retainer)
An embedded GTM operator working on the highest-leverage GTM move each month. Weekly sessions, async access, and a documented motion. Built to run without us.
URL: https://www.off-map.com/services/fractional

## Who We Work With

- Services firms building repeatable revenue
- Seed to Series A founders ($250k to $5M ARR)
- Founder-led selling that has hit a ceiling
- Teams where every deal runs through the founder
- Companies tired of playbooks built for someone else

## FAQ

Q: What does Off-Map do?
A: Off-Map is a GTM consulting practice for services firms and early-stage founders. AI rewrote the rules on how companies build pipeline, develop offers, and run their sales motion. Most available advice is borrowed from a world that no longer exists. We start from the business in front of us and build the motion that actually fits. Three ways to work together: a $350 Audit, a $7,500 Pipeline Sprint, and a Fractional GTM retainer from $4,500 per month.

Q: Who do you work with?
A: Services firms and Seed to Series A founders, typically between $250k and $5M in revenue. The common thread is founder-led selling that has hit a ceiling. Every closed deal runs through you, and the playbooks everyone recommends do not fit where you actually are. That is exactly the stage where Off-Map does its best work.

Q: What's the Audit?
A: The Audit is a $350 engagement: a 60-minute working session, a 1 to 2 page written brief delivered in 72 hours, and a 15-minute follow-up two weeks later. The brief names one thing working, one thing broken, and one move to make next. Most clients use it as a standalone engagement. If you want to go further after, that conversation happens in the follow-up.

Q: How is this different from a fractional CRO?
A: A fractional CRO or VP Sales is a full-time-equivalent operator on a part-time schedule, typically managing a team and owning a number. Fractional GTM is different. We work alongside you on the highest-leverage GTM move each week, without managing headcount or owning quota. The goal is to help you build a motion that runs without us. Most engagements run 6 to 12 months.

## Contact

Email: hello@off-map.com
Website: https://www.off-map.com
Book a call: https://www.off-map.com/book
